title: Birria Inspired Sausage Tacos
description: A twist on traditional street food, these birria-inspired tacos feature juicy sausage and a tangy, fermented slaw.

ingredients.name: Sausage, Mexican Style
ingredients.notes: Look for a mix of pork and beef for best flavor

ingredients.name: Mexican Street Corn
ingredients.notes: Grilled or boiled, with mayonnaise and cotija cheese

instructions: 1. Preheat grill or grill pan to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grill sausage for 4-6 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
3. Meanwhile, toast tortillas on the grill or in a dry pan.
4. Warm the birria-inspired rub in a dry pan over medium heat.
5. Shred the cooked sausage and toss with the rub.
6. Assemble the tacos with the sausage mixture, fermented slaw, and Mexican street corn.
7. Top with chopped onions, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
